creator: hydrapolic@gmail.com
text:
I would like to report a new motherboard to the list:
http://www.freebsd.org/platforms/amd64/motherboards.html

NAME:
Asus P5Q-E

STATUS:
just works: cpu ok, ram ok, sata disks ok (tested with Intel ICH10R), gigabit ethernets ok, usb ok
needs interaction: integrated sound card needs to load the snd_hda kernel module

NOT TESTED:
Silicon image SIL5723 controller, IEEE 1394

NOT WORKING:
Marvell 88SE6121 controller

during boot I see: 

atapci0: <Marvell ATA controller> port 0xdc00-0xdc07,0xd880-0xd883,0xd800-0xd807,0xd480-0xd483,0xd400-0xd40f mem 0xfeaffc00-0xfeafffff irq 16 at device 0.0 on pci3
atapci0: [ITHREAD]

but I cannot see my DVDRW/PATA disk located afterwards.
